from __future__ import annotations


def sorted_list_maintained_with_insert_instead_of_bisect_insort_positive(values: list[int]) -> list[int]:
    ordered: list[int] = []
    for value in values:
        index = 0
        while index < len(ordered) and ordered[index] < value:
            index += 1
        ordered.insert(index, value)
    return ordered
